articles.author: Vic Verbalaitis
articles.title: Trump’s Tacky State Fair Suffers Literal Meltdown - The Daily Beast
articles.description: The president’s celebration of America experienced some technical difficulties.
articles.content:
The first day of President Donald Trumps America extravaganza got off to a runny start. 
The food hall at the presidents Great American State Fair experienced a power outage on Thursday, which cause… [+3592 chars]
